name: Crockpot Tex Mex Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pound ground beef or pork sausage
1 (15.5 oz.) can red kidney beans, drained
1 (4 oz.) can Rotel tomatoes and chilies
1 cup V8 juice or tomato juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the meat and garlic. Drain any excess fat.
2. Stir in chili powder and cumin; cook for 2 more minutes.
3. Meanwhile, in the crockpot (3.5-, 4-, 5-, or 6-quart), combine beans, celery, onions, and green pepper.
4. Add undrained tomatoes, Rotel tomatoes and chilies, vegetable juice, tomato paste, and salt.
5. Stir in the cooked meat from the skillet.
6. Cover and cook on low heat setting for 10-12 hours or on high heat setting for 4-5 hours.
7. Serve chili in soup bowls topped with shredded cheese and sour cream.
Serves 4 to 6.
